name: UU PDP Privacy Policy Review
description: Comprehensive review of privacy policies and data protection documents against UU No. 27/2022 (Indonesia's Personal Data Protection Law). Extracts 41 mandatory and best-practice disclosure fields and validates them against 15 compliance rules covering all 7 core UU PDP sections plus adjacent requirements (UU ITE, Pasal 16 purpose/minimization, Pasal 26 ROPA, Pasal 34 DPIA, Pasal 35-39 security).

fields.name: data_controller_name
fields.description: Name of the data controller (pengendali data pribadi) — company or legal entity responsible for data processing

fields.name: data_controller_address
fields.description: Registered business address of data controller

fields.name: controller_business_registration
fields.description: Business registration identifiers (NIB, SIUP, NPWP, OJK license) of the controller

fields.name: dpo_name
fields.description: Data Protection Officer (DPO / Pejabat Pelindungan Data) name, if appointed (Pasal 53)

fields.name: dpo_contact
fields.description: DPO contact email/phone (Pasal 53 UU PDP)

fields.name: policy_effective_date
fields.description: Date the policy takes effect

fields.name: policy_last_updated
fields.description: Last revision date

fields.name: policy_version_number
fields.description: Explicit version number or identifier of the policy

fields.name: policy_language_indonesian
fields.description: Whether a Bahasa Indonesia version is available (required by UU No. 24/2009 and UU ITE for consumer-facing documents)

fields.name: data_collection_method
fields.description: How personal data is collected (directly from subject, indirectly, from third parties, via cookies/trackers)

fields.name: categories_of_data_collected
fields.description: Types of personal data collected (e.g., name, NIK, email, phone, biometric, financial)

fields.name: sensitive_data_collected
fields.description: Specific/sensitive personal data (kesehatan, biometrik, data anak, data keuangan, genetika, catatan kejahatan) — Pasal 4(2)

fields.name: data_subject_categories
fields.description: Categories of data subjects (customers, employees, prospects, minors, business partners)

fields.name: purpose_of_processing
fields.description: Specific purposes for which data is processed (Pasal 16)

fields.name: purpose_limitation_statement
fields.description: Explicit commitment that data is processed only for specified purposes — Pasal 16(1)(b)

fields.name: data_minimization_statement
fields.description: Statement that only minimum necessary data is collected — Pasal 16(1)(c)

fields.name: legal_basis
fields.description: Legal basis for processing (consent / contract / legal obligation / legitimate interest / vital interest / public task) — Pasal 20

fields.name: consent_mechanism
fields.description: How consent is obtained (explicit opt-in, checkbox, signature, OTP) — Pasal 22

fields.name: consent_withdrawal_procedure
fields.description: How a data subject can withdraw consent (Pasal 9 right)

fields.name: data_retention_period
fields.description: How long data is retained (Pasal 30)

fields.name: data_subject_rights_listed
fields.description: Rights explicitly mentioned (information, access, correction, deletion, portability, withdrawal, object to automated decision) — Pasal 5-13

fields.name: rights_request_response_time
fields.description: SLA for responding to data subject rights requests (UU PDP default: 3x24 jam)

fields.name: rights_request_fee
fields.description: Whether fees are charged for rights requests — Pasal 8 requires them to be free of charge

fields.name: third_party_sharing
fields.description: Third parties with whom data is shared (processors, partners, regulators)

fields.name: processor_list
fields.description: Named data processors (vendors, cloud providers) — Pasal 49-50

fields.name: storage_location
fields.description: Where personal data is stored (Indonesia / specific regions / cloud providers)

fields.name: cross_border_transfer
fields.description: Whether data is transferred outside Indonesia and to which countries — Pasal 55-57

fields.name: cross_border_safeguards
fields.description: Safeguards for international transfer (adequacy / Standard Contractual Clauses / Binding Corporate Rules / Transfer Impact Assessment)

fields.name: security_measures
fields.description: Technical and organizational security measures — Pasal 35

fields.name: encryption_in_transit
fields.description: Encryption used for data in transit (TLS version, VPN, SSL)

fields.name: encryption_at_rest
fields.description: Encryption used for data at rest (AES-256, tokenization, database encryption)

fields.name: access_control_mechanism
fields.description: Access control (RBAC, MFA, principle of least privilege)

fields.name: staff_training_program
fields.description: Privacy awareness training for staff — Pasal 39

fields.name: dpia_conducted
fields.description: Data Protection Impact Assessment performed for high-risk processing — Pasal 34

fields.name: ropa_maintained
fields.description: Record of Processing Activities maintained — Pasal 26

fields.name: breach_notification_procedure
fields.description: Procedure for notifying data breach within 3x24 hours — Pasal 46

fields.name: children_data_handling
fields.description: How children's data (under 18) is handled with parental consent — Pasal 25

fields.name: marketing_opt_out_mechanism
fields.description: How data subjects opt out of marketing communications

fields.name: complaint_channel
fields.description: Channel for data subjects to file complaints (to controller or to Personal Data Protection Agency)

fields.name: automated_decision_making
fields.description: Whether automated decision-making / profiling is used and subject's right to object — Pasal 10

fields.name: policy_update_notification
fields.description: How policy updates are communicated to data subjects and notice period before effect

validation_rules.description: DPO must be appointed for public bodies, large-scale sensitive data processing, or systematic monitoring (Pasal 53). Flag if sensitive data is collected but no DPO contact provided.
Legal basis must be one of the 6 valid grounds in Pasal 20
Privacy policy must disclose all 9 core data subject rights (Pasal 5-13): information, access, correction, deletion, withdrawal, portability, object to automated processing, restriction, compensation
Data retention period must be specified — indefinite retention is not compliant (Pasal 30)
Breach notification must mention 3x24 jam / 72 hours timeline (Pasal 46 UU PDP)
If data is transferred outside Indonesia, safeguards must be documented (Pasal 56)
Policy must describe how to withdraw consent — Pasal 9 right
DPO contact should be an email or phone number
If children's data is collected, parental consent mechanism must be described (Pasal 25)
A complaint channel for data subjects must be disclosed
Consumer-facing policy must be available in Bahasa Indonesia (UU No. 24/2009 and UU ITE)
Technical security must include encryption in transit (TLS/SSL) — Pasal 35
Technical security must include encryption at rest (AES or equivalent) — Pasal 35
Rights requests must be handled free of charge — Pasal 8(4). Flag if policy mentions fees.
DPIA must be conducted for high-risk processing (large-scale sensitive data, systematic monitoring) — Pasal 34. Recommended disclosure.

action_triggers.description: Mark document as UU PDP compliant when all validation rules pass
Auto-generate UU PDP compliance gap report for failed validations
Notify DPO about missing mandatory UU PDP disclosures
Flag high-risk finding: international transfer without adequate safeguards (Pasal 56 violation)
Flag medium-risk: sensitive data processed without documented DPIA (Pasal 34)

nl_prompt: Extract all UU PDP (Undang-Undang Pelindungan Data Pribadi No. 27/2022) disclosure fields from this privacy policy or data protection document. Identify (1) controller identity and business registration, (2) DPO appointment and contact (Pasal 53), (3) policy governance (version, effective date, language availability, update notification), (4) data collection method and categories including sensitive/specific data and data subject categories, (5) purpose of processing with explicit purpose-limitation and data-minimization statements (Pasal 16), (6) legal basis per Pasal 20, (7) consent mechanism and withdrawal procedure (Pasal 9, 22), (8) retention period (Pasal 30) — flag indefinite retention, (9) all 9 data subject rights per Pasal 5-13 plus response SLA and whether rights requests are free (Pasal 8), (10) third-party sharing and named processors (Pasal 49-50), (11) storage location and cross-border transfer arrangements with safeguards (SCC/BCR/TIA per Pasal 55-57), (12) security measures including encryption in transit (TLS) and at rest (AES), access control, staff training (Pasal 35-39), (13) DPIA for high-risk processing (Pasal 34) and Record of Processing Activities (Pasal 26), (14) breach notification procedure (must mention 3x24 jam per Pasal 46), (15) children's data handling with parental consent (Pasal 25), (16) marketing opt-out mechanism, (17) complaint channel (controller and Badan PDP), and (18) automated decision-making disclosure (Pasal 10). Return all values in the original language (Indonesian or English) as they appear. If a field is absent, return null so validation rules can flag the gap.
